title: A New Job on the Boat
article_text: I will settle into my new job as an engineer on a big boat. The boat has a kitchen where we cook fresh food. We must check the safety equipment twice a day. I work with a nurse who gives aid to sick people. The length of the boat is very long, so we divide our work into teams. I have a quiet room somewhere near the engine. The company will expand our team next year. I should not delay my work because it is critical for the team. The insurance company will start an investigation after any problem. I commit to my job with pleasure, and I am a big fan of this life.

sentences.en: I will settle into my new job as an engineer on a big boat.
sentences.zh: 我将安顿下来，在一艘大船上担任工程师。

words.eng_def: to start living in a place or situation
a person who designs or builds machines
a small vehicle for traveling on water

sentences.en: The boat has a kitchen where we cook fresh food.
sentences.zh: 船上有一个厨房，我们在那里烹饪新鲜食物。

words.eng_def: a room where food is prepared
newly made or picked; not old

sentences.en: We must check the safety equipment twice a day.
sentences.zh: 我们必须每天检查两次安全设备。

words.eng_def: the state of being free from danger
two times

sentences.en: I work with a nurse who gives aid to sick people.
sentences.zh: 我和一位护士一起工作，她为生病的人提供帮助。

words.eng_def: a person trained to care for sick people
help or support
Common English word. (definition needs review)

sentences.en: The length of the boat is very long, so we divide our work into teams.
sentences.zh: 船的长度很长，所以我们把工作分成几个小组。

words.eng_def: the measurement of something from one end to the other
to split into parts

sentences.en: I have a quiet room somewhere near the engine.
sentences.zh: 我在发动机附近某个地方有一个安静的房间。

words.eng_def: making little or no noise
in or to a place that is not known
Common English word. (definition needs review)

sentences.en: The company will expand our team next year.
sentences.zh: 公司明年将扩大我们的团队。

words.eng_def: to become larger in size or amount

sentences.en: I should not delay my work because it is critical for the team.
sentences.zh: 我不应该拖延工作，因为这对团队至关重要。

words.eng_def: to make something happen later than planned
very important; involving a serious situation

sentences.en: The insurance company will start an investigation after any problem.
sentences.zh: 发生任何问题后，保险公司都会展开调查。

words.eng_def: an agreement to pay money if something bad happens
a careful search for facts

sentences.en: I commit to my job with pleasure, and I am a big fan of this life.
sentences.zh: 我愉快地投入工作，并且我是这种生活的忠实粉丝。

words.eng_def: to promise to do something
a feeling of happiness or enjoyment
a person who likes someone or something very much

quiz.question_en: What is the Chinese translation of 'investigation'?

image_prompts: A person settling into a new job on a large boat, wearing an engineer uniform, smiling.
A bright kitchen on a boat with fresh vegetables and fruits on the counter.
A worker checking safety equipment on a boat, with a checklist and a clock showing twice a day.
A nurse giving medical aid to a sick person on a boat, with a first aid kit.
A long boat with a measuring tape showing its length, and workers dividing into teams.
A quiet small room near the engine of a boat, with a bed and a window.
A company meeting on a boat with a chart showing team expansion next year.
A person working hard at a desk on a boat, with a clock showing no delay, and a critical sign.
An insurance document and a magnifying glass on a desk, representing an investigation.
A happy person committing to work on a boat, with a fan sign and a pleasure smile.
